personal.name: Muhammad Iqmal Danish bin Hasnan
personal.title: AI Specialist Apprentice | Vision Engineer | Process Engineer
personal.summary: Process Engineer with 1 year of experience in semiconductor manufacturing and 1 year of hands-on experience in Machine Vision and AI development, spanning industrial inspection systems and applied computer vision solutions. Strong background in Python, C/C++, C#, and AI/ML frameworks including PyTorch, TensorFlow, OpenCV, and Halcon, with practical exposure to defect detection, vision automation, and end-to-end system integration in production environments. Seeking to transition into an AI Engineer role, where industrial domain knowledge and applied AI expertise can be leveraged to deliver scalable, real-world intelligent systems.

experience.title: Test Back-End Process Engineer
highlights: Consistently achieved >99.6% QFN yield across key packages by proactively managing QFN and LGA quality issues using structured problem-solving methodologies
Optimized vision inspection recipes for foreign matter detection in HORIZON LGA vent holes, eliminating manual prebake inspection and delivering 0.4 FTE savings
Led cross-functional coordination on approximately 1.4M units of high-risk metal lid TPMS lots, ensuring full traceability and zero quality escape
Recognized with Bronze Award for Technical Excellence Award (TEA) Q3'25 and selected to represent TBE at Technical Symposium 2025

experience.title: Vision Engineer
highlights: Designed and developed machine vision systems using C# and Python, leveraging HALCON and image processing libraries for pharmaceutical inspection requirements
Conducted R&D and feasibility studies on vision setups, including image evaluation, hardware-software selection, and solution proposals
Deployed, optimized, and supported PC-based vision inspection systems, covering software architecture, UI optimization, and system commissioning

experience.title: AI Specialist Apprentice
highlights: Deployed YOLOv8 computer vision models for real-time defect classification on electric poles using PyTorch
Curated and annotated datasets using CVAT and Roboflow for supervised learning model training
Implemented predictive modeling techniques and created Power BI dashboards for data visualization
Achieved superior accuracy in defect detection through advanced machine learning algorithms

education.details: Elective in Computer and Control: Machine Vision, Software Engineering, Intelligent Systems

projects.title: Portfolio RAG Chatbot with AI Assistant
projects.description: Intelligent chatbot integrated into portfolio website using RAG architecture for contextual Q&A
highlights: Implemented Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system using GLM-4.7-Flash model for accurate, context-aware responses
Built full-stack chatbot with Node.js backend, session management, and real-time conversation handling
Designed macOS-style glassmorphic chat widget with smooth animations and markdown support
Integrated TF-IDF vector-based knowledge retrieval from portfolio data with semantic search capabilities

projects.title: Food Image Classification
projects.description: A Streamlit application that uses a MobileNetV2 model to classify food images into 6 categories with 95% accuracy
highlights: Real-time food image classification with confidence scores and three-page navigation: Model Info, Dataset Analysis, and Prediction
Visualizations of dataset distribution and sample images with performance metrics and training configuration details
Support for both file uploads and URL inputs with clean, responsive UI and custom styling
Achieved 95% classification accuracy across 6 food categories using fine-tuned MobileNetV2 architecture

projects.title: Biometric Fingerprint Login System on Vision Scanner
projects.description: Independent biometric authentication system for production vision scanners
highlights: Designed and deployed using C++ and DigitalPersona SDK, achieving USD 5,000 cost savings per machine
Implemented event-driven auto-pop authentication and automatic credential autofill with keyboard input disablement
Integrated Oracle SQL-based credential management and historical access logging for full user traceability
Converted system architecture from 64-bit to 32-bit for legacy scanner compatibility, fully MES-integrated

projects.title: Engineering Room Storage Management System
projects.description: Full-stack inventory management system with barcode-based asset tracking
highlights: Developed using Microsoft Power Apps and PowerFX with barcode-based asset tracking
Implemented closed-loop borrow/return workflows via Power Automate with automated alerts
Integrated SharePoint as backend, reducing manual data entry errors by ~90%

projects.title: CNN Deep Learning Portable Dental Caries Detection
projects.description: Award-winning portable dental caries detection system using deep learning
highlights: Awarded Best Overall Final Year Project in Mechatronics Department
Developed using CNN deep learning (MobileNetV2), achieving 80% detection accuracy
Engineered Android application for real-time dental analysis via endoscopic camera
